caption: Step 1: Open Screener.in and bring the stock search page into view
description: Open Screener.in and bring the stock search page into view
narration: Most people pick stocks on hot tips and gut feel. Today I'll show you how to do it right — with a repeatable checklist on Screener dot in.
fallback_narration: Most people pick stocks on gut feel. Today we use a real checklist on Screener.

caption: Step 2: Type Reliance Industries into the search box and wait for the visible match
description: Type Reliance Industries into the search box and wait for the visible match
narration: Your first move: search for a company. Reliance Industries is our example — India's largest, and perfect for learning what healthy financials actually look like.
fallback_narration: Search Reliance Industries — India's biggest company, a perfect learning subject.

caption: Step 3: Click Reliance Industries from the visible search results
description: Click Reliance Industries from the visible search results
narration: It appears instantly in the dropdown. Click it. We are now inside Reliance's complete financial profile — and the checklist begins.
fallback_narration: It appears right away. Click it. We are now inside Reliance's full financial profile.

caption: Step 4: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
description: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
narration: Top of the page — your first checkpoint. Market Cap tells you the size. P/E tells you if you're overpaying. ROCE tells you if management is actually good at using money.
fallback_narration: Checkpoint one: Market Cap, P/E, and ROCE. Size, price, and capital efficiency — in three numbers.

caption: Step 5: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
description: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
narration: Scroll down to quarterly results. This is where the story either holds up or falls apart. You want that profit line going up and to the right — every single quarter.
fallback_narration: Check quarterly results. Profits should go up every quarter — that line tells the whole story.

caption: Step 6: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
description: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
narration: Next: Profit and Loss. Revenue rising is table stakes. What you really want is expenses growing slower than revenue — that's where the margin lives.
fallback_narration: Profit and Loss: revenue up, expenses controlled. That gap is the margin that matters.

caption: Step 7: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
description: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
narration: Balance Sheet: how much debt is this company carrying? Too much and you are financing their past, not investing in their future.
fallback_narration: Balance Sheet: watch the debt. Too much means you're funding their past, not their future.

caption: Step 8: Click Screens in the top menu to explore ready-made stock filters
description: Click Screens in the top menu to explore ready-made stock filters
narration: Here's where it gets interesting. You don't need to already have a stock in mind. Click Screens — this is Screener's real superpower.
fallback_narration: No stock idea yet? Click Screens — that's where the platform hunts for you.

caption: Step 9: Click Show all screens to open the full screen library
description: Click Show all screens to open the full screen library
narration: Click Show all screens — a full library of pre-built filters, built by experienced investors, all completely free.
fallback_narration: Click Show all screens — a full library of pre-built investor filters, all free.

caption: Step 10: Find the exact High Growth, High RoE, Low PE card in the full screen list
description: Find the exact High Growth, High RoE, Low PE card in the full screen list
narration: Find this filter: High Growth, High RoE, Low PE. Fast-growing, capital-efficient, and not yet overpriced. That combination is rare — and exactly what we are hunting for.
fallback_narration: Find High Growth, High RoE, Low PE — fast, efficient, and cheap. That combination is rare.

caption: Step 11: Click the highlighted High Growth, High RoE, Low PE card
description: Click the highlighted High Growth, High RoE, Low PE card
narration: Click it. Screener scans the entire market and hands you a shortlist in seconds. You did not write a single formula.
fallback_narration: Click it. Screener scans the whole market. Your shortlist appears — no formulas needed.

caption: Step 12: Scan the filtered results table and spot promising names like Ganesh Infra
description: Scan the filtered results table and spot promising names like Ganesh Infra
narration: Every company in this table passed the filter. Scan for clean numbers. Ganesh Infra stands out — strong growth, solid returns, valuation still sane.
fallback_narration: Every name here passed the filter. Ganesh Infra stands out — growth strong, valuation sane.

caption: Step 13: Click Ganesh Infra. from the results and land on the company page
description: Click Ganesh Infra. from the results and land on the company page
narration: Click in and run the same four-point check: P/E, ROCE, quarterly trend, Balance Sheet. It passes — it goes on your shortlist. That is the system.
fallback_narration: Open it. Run the four-point check. It passes — it goes on the shortlist. That is the system.
